name: Facilities
description: Facilities belong to a Site (siteId). Staff-only management. Site-scoped via the same server-side {where siteId in scope.siteIds} pattern as Clients/Applications. amenities is comma-separated text (multiselect in UI). Seeded with DRAFT Downtown Orlando facilities (siteId 9798818); Eustis + Kissimmee DRAFT facilities inserted via MCP post-sync. All seed data is DRAFT until UCF provides real inventory.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: siteId
columns.description: Site this facility belongs to (site scope)
